title: Assembly

figures_detected.description: Side casing attached to SST KV319-K0160 transmission stand
Pitot pipe connection with pin pointed towards centre of bearing
Seal rings installation on secondary pulley guide using Guide KV319-K0110
Gauge Tool KV319-K0130 secured to side case using bolts (tighten bolt from lower side)

content_blocks.text: Before commencing, ensure total cleanliness of all components. Remove any residual ATF from housings, channels, etc.
Replace primary & secondary pulleys as a unit, not individually, if either one is damaged.
If the drive belt shows "slip" marks, replace the belt and both pulleys.

steps.text: Attach the side casing to SST KV319-K0160 transmission stand.
Connect the pitot pipe. Point the pin towards the centre of the bearing, as shown.
notes: The pin must remain like this, until the pulleys/transmission case are assembled. Check the pin position frequently.

steps.text: Install new seal rings on the secondary pulley guide using Tool.
Pulley Alignment and Primary End Play (Replacement of pulleys and side casing)
notes: (1) Remove all traces of old liquid gasket from the side case mating surface, and clean as required.
(2) Dress the mating surface of the side case to remove burrs.
(3) Wash clean the side case to remove all traces of grease.
(4) Secure the gauge Tool to the side case using bolts.

tools_referenced.name: Transmission Stand
tools_referenced.usage: Attach side casing for assembly work

tools_referenced.name: Guide
tools_referenced.usage: Install new seal rings on the secondary pulley guide

tools_referenced.name: Gauge Tool
tools_referenced.usage: Secured to side case for pulley alignment and primary end play measurement

model_notes: Applicable to CVT (Continuously Variable Transmission) automatic transmission assembly procedure
